title: Facilities Executive ( 3 months Contract to 1 year contract ) With Completion Bonus
description:
Job Description:

  • Responsible for the projects and addition & alteration works of hospital, medical centre and other associated business unit as instructed by the management
  • Track preventive maintenance works and service contracts for the department and support the car park operations
  • To assist in projects and addiction & alteration works as assigned by Head of Department or reporting Supervisor
  • Facilitate and manage assigned projects within given deadline & budget
  • Independent and resourceful. Good problem solving & analytical skills
  • Able to work well with people from across different departments and levels
  • Support the car park operations
  • Assist in any other duties assigned
  • Able to manage the work schedule of contractors/ vendors to ensure the work / project within the timeline with minimum disruption to the patients and staff
  • Work with colleagues and contractors to ensure al physical plants and equipment are serviced as planned
  • Any other duties assigned by the Senior Technician/Engineer/Supervisor.

Requirements

  • Possess at least a Diploma or Degree in Facilities / Facilities Management / Building Facility
  • Able to consider Degree holders with no experience as training will be provided
  • Keen to commit for 3 Months contract to 1 year contract
  • Completion bonus provided at the end of 1 year
  • Office hours

For interested candidate, please email your resumes to denyse.tan@recruitexpress.com.sg


Denyse Nicole Tan Shuqin (#HDT)

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

CEI No: R1333503

Company EA license : 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
